meta.purpose: Define terminology, common misunderstandings, and self-checks.
meta.load_condition: Always load when this domain is selected.

preferred_terms.meaning: What this term means in this domain.
preferred_terms.use_when: When the agent should use this term.

banned_terms.why: Why this term misleads agent judgment.

misunderstandings.key_distinction: The distinction the agent must preserve.
misunderstandings.why: Why this misunderstanding creates bad judgment.

self_check.question: Did the answer apply the domain's core distinction instead of giving generic advice?
